translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: In the name of Allah, most benevolent, ever-merciful.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Allah - beginning with the name of - the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: In the Name of God, the Merciful, the Compassionate

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: In the name of Allah, the Compassionate, the Merciful.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: In the Name of Allah, the Most Beneficent, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: In the name of God, the Gracious, the Merciful.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: In the name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Most Merciful

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: In the Name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: ﻿In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: In the name of Allah, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Bismi Allahi alrrahmani alrraheemi

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: ALL PRAISE BE to Allah, Lord of all the worlds,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: All praise is to Allah, the Lord Of The Creation.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Praise belongs to God, the Lord of all Being,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: All praise unto Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: All the praises and thanks be to Allah, the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Praise be to God, Lord of the Worlds.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Praise be to Allah, the Lord of the entire universe.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Al-Hamd be to Allah, the Lord of all that exists.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds,

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all the worlds,

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: All praise belongs to God, Lord of the Universe,

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: All praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: All praise is due to God, the Lord of the Universe;

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Praise be to Allah, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the worlds;

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Alhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameena

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Most beneficent, ever-merciful,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: the All-merciful, the All-compassionate,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: The Compassionate, the Merciful.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: The Most Beneficent, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: The Merciful, the Compassionate

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Ar-Rahman (the Most Gracious), Ar-Rahim (the Most Merciful).

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: The Beneficent, the Merciful.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: the All-beneficent, the All-merciful,

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: the Merciful, the Most Merciful,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: the Beneficent, the Merciful

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: The Beneficent, the Merciful.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: the Beneficent, the Merciful;

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Most Gracious, Most Merciful;

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Alrrahmani alrraheemi

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: King of the Day of Judgement.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Owner of the Day of Recompense

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: the Master of the Day of Doom.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Sovereign of the Day of Requital.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: The Only Owner (and the Only Ruling Judge) of the Day of Recompense (i.e. the Day of Resurrection)

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Master of the Day of Judgment.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: The Master of the Day of Recompense.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: The Owner of the Day of Recompense.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Master of the Day of Judgment,

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Master of the Day of Retribution.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Owner of the Day of Recompense.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: and Master of the Day of Judgment

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Master of the Day of Judgment.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Lord of the Day of Judgement.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Master of the Day of Judgment.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Maliki yawmi alddeeni

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: You alone we worship, and to You alone turn for help.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: You alone we worship and from You alone we seek help (and may we always).

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Thee only we serve; to Thee alone we pray for succour.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Thee alone do we worship and of Thee alone do we seek help,

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: You (Alone) we worship, and you (Alone) we ask for help (for each and everything).

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: It is You we worship, and upon You we call for help.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: You alone do we worship, and You alone do we turn for help

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: You we worship, and You we ask for help.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Thee (alone) we worship; Thee (alone) we ask for help.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: You [alone] do we worship, and to You [alone] do we turn for help.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: You (alone) we worship; and You (alone) we rely for help.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: (Lord), You alone We do worship and from You alone we do seek assistance

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Thee do we serve and Thee do we beseech for help.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: You alone we worship, and to You alone we turn for help.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Thee do we worship, and Thine aid we seek.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Iyyaka naAAbudu waiyyaka nastaAAeenu

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Guide us (O Lord) to the path that is straight,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Guide us on the Straight Path.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Guide us in the straight path,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Guide us Thou unto the path straight

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Guide us to the Straight Way

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Guide us to the straight path.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Direct us on to the Straight Way,

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Guide us to the straight path.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Show us the straight path,

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Guide us on the straight path,

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Guide us to the Straight Path,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Guide us to the straight path -

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: (Lord), guide us to the right path,

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Keep us on the right path.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Guide us to the straight path:

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Show us the straight way,

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Ihdina alssirata almustaqeema

7.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: The path of those You have blessed, Not of those who have earned Your anger, nor those who have gone astray.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: The path of those whom You have favoured – Not the path of those who earned Your anger – nor of those who are astray.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: the path of those whom Thou hast blessed, not of those against whom Thou art wrathful, nor of those who are astray.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: The path of those whom Thou hast favoured. Not of those on whom is indignation brought down, nor of the astray.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: The Way of those on whom You have bestowed Your Grace, not (the way) of those who earned Your Anger, nor of those who went astray.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: The path of those You have blessed, not of those against whom there is anger, nor of those who are misguided.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: The way of those whom You have favoured, who did not incur Your wrath, who are not astray.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: The way of those upon whom You have bestowed Your grace, not (that) of those who earned Your anger, nor of those who went astray.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: The path of those whom Thou hast favoured; Not the (path) of those who earn Thine anger nor of those who go astray.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: the path of those whom You have blessed — such as have not incurred Your wrath, nor are astray.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: the Path of those upon whom You have favored, not those upon whom is the anger, nor the astray. (Amen please answer)

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: the path of those to whom You have granted blessings, those who are neither subject to Your anger nor have gone astray.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: The path of those upon whom Thou hast bestowed favors. Not (the path) of those upon whom Thy wrath is brought down, nor of those who go astray.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: the path of those You have blessed; not of those who have incurred Your wrath, nor of those who have gone astray.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: The way of those on whom Thou hast bestowed Thy Grace, those whose (portion) is not wrath, and who go not astray.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Sirata allatheena anAAamta AAalayhim ghayri almaghdoobi AAalayhim wala alddalleena
